tweets.text:
We are keeping South Dakotans strong, safe, and free. When it comes to safety, one of our biggest opportunities to move the needle is right here in Sioux Falls, and that’s where Operation: Prairie Thunder comes in. 

Over the next five months, we’ll dedicate 10 to 15 Highway Patrol officers to help with saturation patrols in the Sioux Falls metro area.

And we are expanding our work alongside @ICEgov. Highway Patrol will support ICE with arrests. The National Guard will support ICE with processing and administrative functions. And DOC will support ICE with transportation, identifying illegal immigrants in our prisons, and getting them paroled to ICE custody.

We are taking decisive action to hold criminals accountable and protect our communities.

And we are expanding our work alongside @ICEgov. Highway Patrol will support ICE with arrests. The National Guard will support ICE with processing and administrative functions. And DOC will support ICE with transportation, identifying illegal immigrants in our prisons, and getting them paroled to ICE custody.

We are taking decisive action to hold criminals accountable and protect our communities.

author.description: Husband, dad, grandpa, rancher, and the 34th Governor of South Dakota.
